rows.supporting_quote: Due to current funding limitations the Housing Choice Voucher (HCV) Program will not be opening the voucher lottery in July this year. ... The current directive from HUD to pause the issuance of new Housing Choice Vouchers is, unfortunately, still in effect.

rows.supporting_quote: Mayor Suthers established ... a community goal to build, preserve and create opportunities to purchase an average of 1,000 affordable units per year over the next five years. ... Increasing production means expanding key housing programs that make possible new construction of multi-family rental housing, increased opportunities for homeownership, and the creation of more permanent supportive housing units

rows.supporting_quote: The Strategic Doing Framework ... is organized around five priorities, which are public safety, infrastructure, housing solutions, economic vitality and community activation.
The 2025 Strategic Doing Actions ... are tied to the City’s five strategic priorities ... In 2024, the City set 54 actions, of which 44 were completed and 10 are in progress.

The City of Colorado Springs has 1,703 affordable multi-family units either under construction or expected to begin construction ... 1,236 units are anticipated for completion before 2025 ... In 2022, the City ... supporting 1,057 affordable units ... launched the Affordable and Attainable Multi-Family Fee Rebate Program in second quarter of 2022.
